verbatim_text: That's the key property. And we typically get this behavior by running what we call in computer science as an algorithm. So we can think about test time adaptation as running an algorithm. So an algorithm is nothing but a randomized mapping. It's from an input to a trace of operations or computations performed on that input. And if doing test time adaptation is nothing but running this algorithm, then fundamentally learning to adapt at test time is nothing but learning this algorithm. So throughout the talk, whenever we think about training models or learning models that adapt at test time, we're essentially saying that we are trying to learn algorithms or train algorithms.
